HMM_LOW_CONFIDENCE: Regime confidence below threshold -> degraded to conservative
ALT_COT_EXTREME_CONFIRM: COT extreme + CME confirms -> loosen threshold
ALT_COT_EXTREME_CONTRADICT: COT extreme + CME contradicts -> tighten threshold
TF_CONFIRM_ALIGNED: Lower TF confirmers aligned with trade direction — threshold loosened
TF_CONFIRM_CONFLICTED: Lower TF confirmers conflicted with trade direction — threshold tightened
TF_CONFIRM_ONLY: Timeframe is CONFIRM_ONLY role — signal recorded but no trade executed
TF_ROLE_CONFIRM_ONLY: TF is in CONFIRM_ONLY role — signal recorded but no trade executed
BLOCK_DISABLED: Block disabled in registry — no execution permitted
